TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Brandon_Adams_(actor), title = Brandon_Adams_(actor), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Brandon_Adams_(actor)} }

S.FORM: Brandon Adams kawas tay 1979, ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 8, Brandon Adams, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Brandon Adams kawas tay 1979, ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 8, Brandon Adams, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: βran*on a*ams~ɕ kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βran*on a*ams~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
